inputs.label: Incident Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle between the incident ray and the surface normal, measured in degrees. This is the primary variable determining the reflectivity via Fresnel equations.

inputs.label: Refractive Index (n₁)
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the incident medium (e.g., air = 1.0). Governs the speed of light and the angle of refraction.

inputs.label: Refractive Index (n₂)
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the transmitting medium (e.g., glass ≈ 1.5). Influences the reflectivity and critical angle for total internal reflection.

inputs.label: Wavelength
inputs.businessContext: Wavelength of light in vacuum (nominal). For documentation and dispersion reference only; not used in this calculation.
